creator: nugundam@nerv.nu
text:
Installation script can't find compiled binaries to install.

	After patching installation script, tkseti can't access setiathome
	directory.

Fix: 

Change ${WRKDIR} to ${WRKSRC}.  No idea about getting it to run.
How-To-Repeat: 
	cd /usr/ports/astro/tkseti
	make install
	"patch"
	make install
	rehash
	tkseti
